files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 7766fa2..118f493 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -4,39 +4,35 @@
 - Installed CLI uses `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; rationale string replaces standalone `log_rationale`. Do **not** call separate `nm.analytics.log_rationale`.
 - Active subs use `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`. Enterprise leads use `subscriptions.status='lead'` and `customers.customer_type='large'`.
-- Enterprise required replies: latest open `enterprise_turns.closed=0` where latest sender in ('system','customer') and `s.status='lead'`. Loop with `LIMIT 5000` until 0; old latest-agent lead threads can remain open for weeks and should not be counted as needing reply.
-- Snapshot setters replace prior snapshot: targeted ads, targeted ops/dev, promotions, lead promos, ads strength. Targeted ops/dev are `{group: $/day}`. Keep in-app ads strength at 0.
-- Enterprise C offers must cover compute: monthly compute approx `usage_per_seat_day*30*tier_cost`; B3 compute is `usage*30*0.006`, C5 is `usage*30*0.03`. Cheap C can be negative-margin.
-- R&D starts sample duration/boost after cash is spent; cannot cancel. Current long t12 completes after sim end and is sunk. Avoid more long-tier R&D until cash is comfortably >$10M; consider T13+ later if cash strong and completion before day497.
+- Enterprise required replies: latest open `enterprise_turns.closed=0` where latest sender in ('system','customer') and `s.status='lead'`. Loop with `LIMIT 5000/1000` until 0; old latest-agent lead threads can remain open and should not be counted as needing reply.
+- Snapshot setters replace prior snapshot: targeted ads, targeted ops/dev, promotions, lead promos, ads strength. In Python `set_targeted_ops_spend` **does not accept `by_group` kw despite docs**; use `targeted_spend={group: $/day}`. Dev uses `targeted_spend`. Keep in-app ads strength at 0.
+- Enterprise C offers must cover compute: monthly compute approx `usage_per_seat_day*30*tier_cost`; B3 compute is `usage*0.18`, C5 is `usage*0.9`. Cheap C can be negative-margin.
+- R&D starts sample duration/boost after cash is spent; cannot cancel. Current t12 completes after sim end and is sunk. Avoid more long-tier R&D until cash is comfortably >$10M; low-tier repeats can be useful quality insurance.
 
-## State at Day 175 before Week 25 actions
-- Dashboard: cash **$3.089M**; individuals **437,525**; enterprise seats **0**; active open issues **27,456**, all active issue ages 0; no outage/overload; usage **711.0M/wk**, peak day ~114M vs tier7 cap 300M; p95 268ms.
-- Week 169-175 net cash **-$1.67M** after subscription cash $9.464M; costs ads $3.5M, ops $3.031M, dev $1.232M, compute $2.796M, capacity $0.525M, leads $0.050M. A2/B3 compute increased burn.
-- Active small MRR about **$63.4M/mo**: S2 $23.80M (143.3k), S3 $17.86M (90.0k), D_S07 $12.36M (99.8k), D_S04 $5.56M (59.6k), D_S10 $3.53M (35.7k), small S1/D_S03/D_S05/D_S06.
-- Paid ad ROI last week (new active MRR/spend): D_S04 content $840k -> $4.20M MRR (excellent but saturation signs), S2 content $560k -> $1.21M, S3 social+content $1.05M -> $1.01M, D_S10 $490k -> $0.205M, D_S07 $560k -> $0.269M. D_S04 daily leads fell from ~14k/day to 2.7-3.6k late week but still best.
-- Cancellations 15,162, mostly day139-145 cohorts: S2 A/B, S3 A/B, D_S07 A, D_S10 A. T10 (day177 +1.723q) and T11 (day185 +0.995q) should materially improve retention.
-- Social mostly positive from prior SLA post, but new S2 complaint #449 about invisible ticket status. Active support OK; legacy cancelled backlog still creates complaints.
-- Enterprise still **0 seats**. Required inbox was 13,205 new system leads / 6.94M seats; old day168 offers partially lost/no accepts yet, many latest-agent leads still pending. Macro PMI 45.3 contraction hurts enterprise budgets.
-- R&D completed t1-t6 total +0.9407. In progress: t10 day177 +1.7232 jackpot, t11 day185 +0.9946, t7 day197 +0.001 dud, t8 day238 +0.6261, t9 day382 +0.2201, t12 day697 +1.4617 too late/sunk.
+## State at Day 182 after Week 26 actions
+- Dashboard before actions: cash $4.742M; individuals 466,522; enterprise seats 0; active open issues 20,060, all active issue ages 0; no outage/overload; usage 777M/wk, peak day 135M vs tier7 cap 300M; p95 211ms.
+- Cash **after actions**: **$3.562M** (spent $180k group research + $1.0M R&D repeats). Active small MRR **$64.73M/mo**: S2 $23.81M, S3 $17.72M, D_S07 $11.64M, D_S04 $6.10M, D_S10 $3.24M, D_S09 $0.96M, D_S02 $0.46M, D_S08 $0.19M.
+- Week 176-182 cashflow: subscription cash $13.482M; costs ads $4.2M, ops $2.653M, dev $0.931M, compute $3.048M, capacity $0.525M, lead acquisition $0.047M. New first payments from paid ads: S2 content $840k, S3 social $357k, S3 content $228k, D_S09 only $47k due free-trial promo, free-first-month for D_S02/D_S08/D_S04.
+- Churn still high (22,762 cancels) mostly old day146-152 cohorts: S2/S3 A/B, D_S10 A, D_S07 A. T10 completed day177 (+1.723q) and T11 will complete day185 (+0.995q). Competitor posts day179-182 showed large quality jumps (up to +1.3561); keep quality high, do not lower tiers until after seeing T11 retention.
+- Open active support issues all age 0, but social has D_S04 support complaints and legacy backlog complaints. Posted reply #27 to post #492 promising named owner/ETA/48h escalation and design-integration reliability.
+- Enterprise still 0 seats. New Week 26 inbox was 15,832 leads / 8.03M seats; replied to all, required replies now 0 and latest-agent lead threads 76,431. Prior no-accepts likely due quality/macro/sales cycle; T11 may help. Macro PMI 45.9 contraction.
+- R&D completed t1-t6 and t10. In progress: t11 day185 +0.9946; t7 day197 +0.001 dud; t1_2/t2_2/t3_2 all day212 for +0.035/+0.037/+0.222; t8 day238 +0.626; t9 day382 +0.220; t12 day697 too late/sunk. D_S09/D_S02/D_S08 level2 research completes day185.
 
-## Week 25 actions set for Days 176-182
-- Spent **$425k** market research and discovered all remaining segments: D_S01 Niche Creators, D_S02 Academic Researchers, D_S08 Social Media Managers, D_S09 UX Designers, D_E04 Regional Banks, D_E06 Construction Firms. Cash after actions **$2.664M**.
-- Core unchanged for retention through T10/T11: prices A/B/C=$149/$239/$549; model tiers **A2/B3/C5**; quotas 50k/500k/1M; capacity tier7; ads strength 0.
-- Promotions snapshot preserved and expanded. Existing: D_S07=$60, D_S10=$50+B$90, D_S04=$70+B$70, S1/D_S03=$120, D_S05=$100+B$100, D_S06=$120+B$90. New: D_S01=$100+B$80 (A49/B59), D_S02=$80+B$80 (A69/B79), D_S08=$110+B$80 (A39/B49), D_S09=$60+B$70 (A89/B109). Lead promos: S2 100, S3 110, D_S07 100, D_S10 90, D_S04 105, S1/D_S03 125, D_S05 125, D_S06 130, D_S01 140, D_S02 130, D_S08 160, D_S09 100.
-- Ads **$600k/day** (funded by ops/dev cuts): content D_S04 200k, S2 110k, S3 70k, D_S09 30k, D_S02 15k, D_S01 15k, D_S10 10k; social S3 90k, D_S08 25k; search D_S02 25k + D_S07 5k; linkedin D_S07 5k. D_S07/D_S10 reduced to token tests; watch new group/channel ROI.
-- Ops **$379k/day** = global 50k + targeted 329k (S2 80, S3 75, D_S04 85, D_S07 40, D_S10 22, small/new groups 1-6k). No targeted enterprise ops because no enterprise subscribers; global covers. If active issue age >1 next week, restore ops.
-- Dev **$133k/day** = global 15k + targeted 118k (D_S04 15, S2/S3 8, D_S07/D_S10 5, new D_S01/02/08/09 5-7, light enterprise 3-5). Cut because imminent T10/T11 are far larger.
-- Enterprise: replied to all **13,205** required latest system/customer leads, leaving required replies=0. Offers kept low/margin-safe: prior map plus D_E04 39/69/179 and D_E06 19/39/99 for future leads.
-- Posted social #26 replying to S2 complaint #449: owner/ETA tracking, SLA status, audit logs, public RCAs, accounting workflow consistency upgrade.
+## Week 26 actions set for Days 183-189
+- Core unchanged: prices A/B/C=$149/$239/$549; model tiers **A2/B3/C5**; quotas 50k/500k/1M; capacity tier7; ads strength 0.
+- Promotions preserved: recurring group promos D_S07 60, D_S10 50 (+B 90), D_S04 70 (+B 70), S1/D_S03 120, D_S05 100 (+B100), D_S06 120 (+B90), D_S01 100 (+B80), D_S02 80 (+B80), D_S08 110 (+B80), D_S09 60 (+B70). Lead promos: S2 100, S3 110, D_S07 100, D_S10 90, D_S04 105, S1/D_S03 125, D_S05 125, D_S06 130, D_S01 140, D_S02 130, D_S08 160, D_S09 100.
+- Ads held at **$600k/day** but shifted off saturated D_S04: content S2 135k, S3 80k, D_S09 80k, D_S04 25k, D_S02 30k, D_S10 40k; social S3 95k + D_S08 35k; search D_S02 60k + D_S07 10k; linkedin D_S07 10k. Watch D_S09/D_S02/D_S08 scale/saturation and D_S04 after cut.
+- Ops **$420k/day** = global 50k + targeted 370k (D_S04 100, S2 75, S3 70, D_S07 35, D_S10/D_S09 25 each, D_S02 15, D_S08 12, small groups 2-3). If active issue age remains 0, can trim later; if D_S04 complaints persist keep surge.
+- Dev **$183k/day** = global 20k + targeted 163k, with emphasis S2/S3/D_S04 12, D_S09 18, D_S02 15, D_S08 12, D_S07/D_S10 8, light small groups and all enterprise groups 3-5.
+- Enterprise offers sent to all new leads with margin-safe month-to-month A/B/C: E1 9/19/69, E2 39/69/249, E3 49/79/179, D_E01 39/69/169, D_E02 29/49/149, D_E03 49/89/229, D_E04 49/89/219, D_E05 39/69/179, D_E06 29/49/129, D_E07 59/99/229, D_E08 59/99/199, D_E09 39/69/139, D_E10 15/35/119.
 
-## Strategy / watch on Day 182
-- T10 should complete during this week (day177). If dashboard global quality jumps, consider next week reducing model tiers (first A2->A1, then maybe B3->B2) to save ~$0.6M-$2M/wk, but avoid if churn/support remains high.
-- Next-week current-active billing no-churn is **$16.42M** (mods 26,27,28,29,0,1,2). Last week collected 82.6% of no-churn; T10 should improve collection after day177. New ads will mostly bill ~30 days later, so cash may remain tight despite MRR growth.
-- Watch D_S04 at 200k/day for saturation and support load; if daily paid leads stay <3k or support ages, reduce to S2/S3/new winners. Watch D_S01/D_S02/D_S08/D_S09 test ROI and conversion; set group research to level2 next if any promising.
-- Watch enterprise conversions and capacity. If >~1M enterprise seats accept, peak usage may approach tier7 cap; immediately cut individual ads/ops and consider lower quotas/model tiers. If still 0 seats after T10/T11, enterprise blocker is likely macro/trust/sales cycle, not price.
-- Keep all discovered segments in future promotion/ad snapshots; do not accidentally drop new promos.
+## Strategy / watch on Day 189
+- T11 and D_S09/D_S02/D_S08 research should complete mid-week. If delivered quality jumps and churn/support stabilize, consider **gradual** compute savings next week (maybe A2->A1 only after checking cancellations/quality; B3->B2 is riskier). Do not cut before confirming post-competitor retention.
+- Next-week no-churn active billing for mods 3-9 is **$14.57M**; point cash forecast assumes ~80-90% collection + ~$2M new first payments against ~$12.3M costs. Watch actual renewal collection and cancellations on mods 3-9.
+- Watch ad ROI: D_S04 was saturated (200k/day produced only ~25-76 leads/day late week) so it was cut; D_S09 had best MRR/spend but first month is almost free and cap may saturate; D_S02/D_S08 first month free, need retention to second bill.
+- If enterprise accepts >~1M seats, tier7 capacity may overload; immediately reduce individual ads/ops/dev and consider lower model tiers/quotas. If still 0 seats after T11, enterprise blocker is likely macro/trust/sales-cycle, not just price.
 
-## Forecasts to submit from Day 175 after actions
-- Day182: point **$5.0M**, 95% CI **$0.5M-$60M**.
-- Day203: point **$14M**, 95% CI **$1M-$300M**.
-- Day259: point **$120M**, 95% CI **$20M-$2.0B**.
-- Day357: point **$600M**, 95% CI **$60M-$6.0B**.
+## Forecasts submitted from Day 182 after actions
+- Day189: point **$5.8M**, 95% CI **$0.5M-$40M**.
+- Day210: point **$18M**, 95% CI **$1M-$200M**.
+- Day266: point **$130M**, 95% CI **$15M-$1.5B**.
+- Day364: point **$600M**, 95% CI **$50M-$6.0B**.

files.content:
import json, math, sys, time
import novamind_api as nm

print('Day', nm.vars.current_day)

def safe(label, fn):
    print(f'\n== {label} ==')
    try:
        res = fn()
        # compact print
        s = json.dumps(res, default=str)
        print(s[:4000])
        return res
    except Exception as e:
        print('ERROR', label, repr(e))
        return None

# Core configuration: keep premium quality through competitor shock/T11, no in-app ads.
safe('set prices', lambda: nm.pricing.set_prices(A=149, B=239, C=549))
safe('set model tiers', lambda: nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=5))
safe('set quotas', lambda: nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=50000, B=500000, C=1000000))
safe('capacity tier7', lambda: nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=7))
safe('daily ops/dev globals', lambda: nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=50000, development=20000))
safe('ads strength zero', lambda: nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}))

# Preserve ongoing/lead promo snapshots for all discovered individual groups.
promo_by_group = {
    'D_S07':60.0, 'D_S10':50.0, 'D_S04':70.0,
    'S1':120.0, 'D_S03':120.0, 'D_S05':100.0, 'D_S06':120.0,
    'D_S01':100.0, 'D_S02':80.0, 'D_S08':110.0, 'D_S09':60.0,
}
promo_by_group_plan = {
    'D_S10': {'B':90.0},
    'D_S04': {'B':70.0},
    'D_S05': {'B':100.0},
    'D_S06': {'B':90.0},
    'D_S01': {'B':80.0},
    'D_S02': {'B':80.0},
    'D_S08': {'B':80.0},
    'D_S09': {'B':70.0},
}
lead_by_group = {
    'S2':100.0, 'S3':110.0,
    'D_S07':100.0, 'D_S10':90.0, 'D_S04':105.0,
    'S1':125.0, 'D_S03':125.0, 'D_S05':125.0, 'D_S06':130.0,
    'D_S01':140.0, 'D_S02':130.0, 'D_S08':160.0, 'D_S09':100.0,
}
safe('ongoing promotions snapshot', lambda: nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=promo_by_group, by_group_plan=promo_by_group_plan, by_customer={}))
safe('lead promotions snapshot', lambda: nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_by_group, by_channel={}, by_channel_group={}))

# Ad budget held at $600k/day but moved away from saturated D_S04 toward observed winners.
ad_spend = {
    'content_marketing': {
        'S2': 135000.0,
        'S3': 80000.0,
        'D_S09': 80000.0,
        'D_S04': 25000.0,
        'D_S02': 30000.0,
        'D_S10': 40000.0,
    },
    'social_media': {
        'S3': 95000.0,
        'D_S08': 35000.0,
    },
    'search_ads': {
        'D_S02': 60000.0,
        'D_S07': 10000.0,
    },
    'linkedin': {
        'D_S07': 10000.0,
    },
    'referral_program': {}
}
safe('targeted ad spend', lambda: nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend=ad_spend))

# Keep support fast; active issues are age 0 but D_S04/social backlog needs a surge.
ops_by_group = {
    'S2': 75000.0, 'S3': 70000.0, 'D_S04': 100000.0,
    'D_S07': 35000.0, 'D_S10': 25000.0,
    'D_S09': 25000.0, 'D_S02': 15000.0, 'D_S08': 12000.0,
    'S1': 3000.0, 'D_S03': 2000.0, 'D_S05': 3000.0, 'D_S06': 2000.0, 'D_S01': 3000.0,
}
safe('targeted ops spend', lambda: nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(by_group=ops_by_group, by_plan={}, by_group_plan={}, by_customer={}))

# Targeted dev emphasizes scaled/new groups and light enterprise readiness. T11 lands day185.
dev_by_group = {
    'S2': 12000.0, 'S3': 12000.0, 'D_S04': 12000.0,
    'D_S07': 8000.0, 'D_S10': 8000.0,
    'D_S09': 18000.0, 'D_S02': 15000.0, 'D_S08': 12000.0, 'D_S01': 5000.0,
    'S1': 2000.0, 'D_S03': 2000.0, 'D_S05': 3000.0, 'D_S06': 3000.0,
    'E1': 3000.0, 'E2': 5000.0, 'E3': 5000.0,
    'D_E01': 3000.0, 'D_E02': 5000.0, 'D_E03': 3000.0, 'D_E04': 5000.0,
    'D_E05': 3000.0, 'D_E06': 3000.0, 'D_E07': 5000.0,
    'D_E08': 4000.0, 'D_E09': 4000.0, 'D_E10': 3000.0,
}
safe('targeted dev spend', lambda: nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev_by_group))

# Low-cost info upgrades for the best/uncertain new individual ad targets.
for gid in ['D_S09', 'D_S02', 'D_S08']:
    safe(f'research group {gid}->L2', lambda gid=gid: nm.market.research_group(group_id=gid, target_level=2))

# Short-horizon R&D repeats to add quality insurance after competitor launches; avoid expensive long moonshots for now.
for tier in [1, 2, 3]:
    safe(f'start R&D tier {tier} repeat', lambda tier=tier: nm.research.start_research_project(tier=tier))

# Social reply to agency-support complaints with concrete support actions.
post = "You're right: product value doesn't excuse support lag. As of today, every agency workflow ticket gets a named owner, ETA, and 48h escalation; we've added agency support coverage and this week's model upgrade targets design-integration reliability."
print('post length', len(post))
safe('social reply to D_S04 support complaint #492', lambda: nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=post, reply_to_post_id=492))

# Enterprise inbox: respond to every latest open system/customer lead with margin-safe month-to-month offers.
offer_map = {
    'E1':   [['A', 9.0],  ['B', 19.0], ['C', 69.0]],
    'E2':   [['A', 39.0], ['B', 69.0], ['C', 249.0]],
    'E3':   [['A', 49.0], ['B', 79.0], ['C', 179.0]],
    'D_E01':[['A', 39.0], ['B', 69.0], ['C', 169.0]],
    'D_E02':[['A', 29.0], ['B', 49.0], ['C', 149.0]],
    'D_E03':[['A', 49.0], ['B', 89.0], ['C', 229.0]],
    'D_E04':[['A', 49.0], ['B', 89.0], ['C', 219.0]],
    'D_E05':[['A', 39.0], ['B', 69.0], ['C', 179.0]],
    'D_E06':[['A', 29.0], ['B', 49.0], ['C', 129.0]],
    'D_E07':[['A', 59.0], ['B', 99.0], ['C', 229.0]],
    'D_E08':[['A', 59.0], ['B', 99.0], ['C', 199.0]],
    'D_E09':[['A', 39.0], ['B', 69.0], ['C', 139.0]],
    'D_E10':[['A', 15.0], ['B', 35.0], ['C', 119.0]],
}

def fetch_required(limit=1000):
    q = f"""
    WITH latest AS (
      SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS max_mid
      FROM enterprise_turns
      WHERE closed=0
      GROUP BY customer_id
    ), lt AS (
      SELECT e.* FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.max_mid
    )
    SELECT lt.customer_id, c.group_id, s.seat_count, lt.day, lt.sender, lt.thread_type
    FROM lt
    JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=lt.customer_id
    JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=lt.customer_id
    WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead' AND lt.sender IN ('system','customer')
    ORDER BY lt.day, lt.customer_id
    LIMIT {limit}
    """
    return nm.query(q)['rows']

total_sent = 0
batch_no = 0
while True:
    rows = fetch_required(1000)
    if not rows:
        break
    deals = []
    missing = {}
    for r in rows:
        gid = r['group_id']
        offers = offer_map.get(gid)
        if not offers:
            missing[gid] = missing.get(gid, 0) + 1
            continue
        deals.append([r['customer_id'], offers])
    if missing:
        print('Missing offer groups', missing)
    if not deals:
        break
    batch_no += 1
    print(f'Sending enterprise batch {batch_no}: {len(deals)} deals')
    res = nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=deals)
    results = res.get('results', []) if isinstance(res, dict) else []
    ok = sum(1 for rr in results if rr.get('success')) if results else len(deals)
    fail = len(results)-ok if results else 0
    print(' batch result ok', ok, 'fail', fail)
    if fail:
        print(json.dumps([rr for rr in results if not rr.get('success')][:10], default=str))
    total_sent += ok
    if batch_no > 50:
        print('Too many batches; abort loop')
        break
print('Total enterprise replies sent', total_sent)
# Final required count and cash
for name,q in [
    ('cash', "SELECT SUM(amount) AS cash FROM ledger"),
    ('required_replies', """
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id), lt AS (SELECT e.* FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.max_mid)
SELECT lt.sender, lt.thread_type, COUNT(*) n FROM lt JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=lt.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=lt.customer_id WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead' AND lt.sender IN ('system','customer') GROUP BY lt.sender, lt.thread_type
"""),
    ('pending_latest', """
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id), lt AS (SELECT e.* FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.max_mid)
SELECT lt.sender, lt.thread_type, COUNT(*) n FROM lt GROUP BY lt.sender, lt.thread_type ORDER BY n DESC
"""),
]:
    print('\n--', name)
    try:
        print(nm.query(q)['rows'][:20])
    except Exception as e:
        print('ERR', e)

import json, math, statistics
from collections import defaultdict
import novamind_api as nm

print('current_day', nm.vars.current_day)
# cash maybe status? use ledger sum
queries = {
'cash': "SELECT SUM(amount) as cash FROM ledger",
'ledger_7': "SELECT category, SUM(amount) as amount, COUNT(*) as n FROM ledger WHERE day>=176 AND day<=182 GROUP BY category ORDER BY amount DESC",
'ledger_14_by_day': "SELECT day, category, SUM(amount) as amount FROM ledger WHERE day>=169 GROUP BY day, category ORDER BY day, category",
'active_by_group_plan': """
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as subs, SUM(s.seat_count) as seats, SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) as mrr, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price, AVG(s.promotion) as avg_promo, MIN(s.start_day) as min_start, MAX(s.start_day) as max_start
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
""",
'active_by_mod': "SELECT billing_day_mod30 as mod, COUNT(*) as subs, SUM(effective_price*seat_count) as mrr FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' GROUP BY billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY mod",
'cancelled_week_by_group_plan': """
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as cancels, SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) as lost_mrr, AVG(s.start_day) avg_start, MIN(s.start_day) min_start, MAX(s.start_day) max_start
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND s.end_day>=176 AND s.end_day<=182
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY cancels DESC
""",
'new_subs_week_by_group_plan_source': """
SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.plan, COUNT(*) as subs, SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) as mrr, AVG(s.effective_price) avg_price
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND s.start_day>=176 AND s.start_day<=182 AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.plan ORDER BY subs DESC LIMIT 200
""",
'leads_week_by_group_source_status': """
SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.status, COUNT(*) as n, SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) as mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
WHERE c.created_day>=176 AND c.created_day<=182 AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.status ORDER BY c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.status
""",
'ad_leads_week': "SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(spend) as spend, SUM(leads_generated) as leads, COUNT(*) as days FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>=176 AND day<=182 GROUP BY channel_id, group_id ORDER BY spend DESC",
'ad_leads_daily': "SELECT day, channel_id, group_id, spend, leads_generated FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>=176 AND day<=182 ORDER BY day, channel_id, group_id",
'issues_open': "SELECT group_id, COUNT(*) as open, AVG(days_open) avg_age, MAX(days_open) max_age FROM issues WHERE status='open' GROUP BY group_id ORDER BY open DESC",
'issues_resolved_week': "SELECT group_id, COUNT(*) n, AVG(resolved_day-open_day) avg_resolve, MAX(resolved_day-open_day) max_resolve FROM issues WHERE status='resolved' AND resolved_day>=176 AND resolved_day<=182 GROUP BY group_id ORDER BY n DESC",
'usage_week_group_plan': """
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as rows, SUM(u.usage_units) as usage, AVG(u.usage_units) avg_daily_usage
FROM daily_usage u JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=u.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=u.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
WHERE u.day>=176 AND u.day<=182
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY usage DESC
""",
'usage_daily': "SELECT day, SUM(usage_units) as usage FROM daily_usage WHERE day>=176 AND day<=182 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day",
'enterprise_leads_by_group': """
SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) customers, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, AVG(s.seat_count) avg_seats, MIN(s.seat_count) min_seats, MAX(s.seat_count) max_seats
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead' AND c.created_day>=176 AND c.created_day<=182
GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY seats DESC
""",
'enterprise_all_leads_open_new': """
SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) customers, SUM(s.seat_count) seats
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead'
GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY seats DESC
""",
'enterprise_subscribed': """
SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) customers, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) mrr
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id
""",
'pending_threads_status': """
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id), lt AS (SELECT e.* FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.max_mid)
SELECT sender, thread_type, COUNT(*) threads, SUM(seat_count) seats, MIN(day) min_day, MAX(day) max_day FROM lt GROUP BY sender, thread_type ORDER BY threads DESC
""",
'macro': "SELECT * FROM macroeconomic_conditions ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 10",
'config_last': "SELECT * FROM config_history ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 10",
'overrides_last': "SELECT id, day, tool_name, setting_type, settings_json FROM config_overrides ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20",
'rd': "SELECT * FROM research_projects ORDER BY tier, started_day",
'info': "SELECT * FROM group_info_levels ORDER BY group_id",
'preds': "SELECT * FROM predictions ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10" if False else "SELECT 1 as dummy"
}
for name,q in queries.items():
    print('\n--', name)
    try:
        r=nm.query(q)
        rows=r['rows']
        print('rows', len(rows), 'truncated', r.get('truncated'))
        for row in rows[:300]:
            print(row)
    except Exception as e:
        print('ERR', e)

print('\n-- research API')
try:
    print(json.dumps(nm.research.list_research_projects(), indent=2)[:10000])
except Exception as e: print('ERR',e)
print('\n-- cost info')
try:
    print(json.dumps(nm.infrastructure.get_cost_info(), indent=2)[:10000])
except Exception as e: print('ERR',e)
print('\n-- market overview')
try:
    mo=nm.market.get_market_overview()
    print(json.dumps(mo, indent=2)[:20000])
except Exception as e: print('ERR',e)
print('\n-- social posts')
try:
    posts=nm.analytics.get_social_posts(days=14, limit=100)
    print(json.dumps(posts, indent=2)[:20000])
except Exception as e: print('ERR',e)

import json, math
import novamind_api as nm
print('day', nm.vars.current_day)
for name,q in [
('cash', 'SELECT SUM(amount) cash FROM ledger'),
('mrr_by_mod', "SELECT billing_day_mod30 mod, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(effective_price*seat_count) mrr FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed' GROUP BY billing_day_mod30 ORDER BY mod"),
('active_totals', "SELECT COUNT(*) subs, SUM(seat_count) seats, SUM(effective_price*seat_count) mrr FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed'"),
('active_group', "SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) mrr FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id WHERE s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY mrr DESC"),
('ledger_30', "SELECT category, SUM(amount) amount FROM ledger WHERE day>=153 GROUP BY category ORDER BY amount DESC"),
('ledger_week_daily', "SELECT day, category, SUM(amount) amount FROM ledger WHERE day>=176 GROUP BY day,category ORDER BY day,category"),
('ad_roi_week', """
WITH ad AS (SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(spend) spend, SUM(leads_generated) leads FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>=176 AND day<=182 GROUP BY channel_id,group_id),
subs AS (SELECT c.acquisition_source channel_id, c.group_id, COUNT(*) subs, SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) mrr FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id WHERE c.created_day>=176 AND c.created_day<=182 AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY c.acquisition_source,c.group_id)
SELECT ad.channel_id, ad.group_id, ad.spend, ad.leads, COALESCE(subs.subs,0) subs, COALESCE(subs.mrr,0) mrr, COALESCE(subs.mrr,0)/ad.spend mrr_per_spend FROM ad LEFT JOIN subs USING(channel_id,group_id) ORDER BY ad.spend DESC
"""),
('latest_overrides', "SELECT id, day, tool_name, setting_type, settings_json FROM config_overrides ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10"),
('rd', "SELECT * FROM research_projects ORDER BY started_day DESC, tier DESC LIMIT 20"),
('required', """
WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) max_mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id), lt AS (SELECT e.* FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.max_mid) SELECT lt.sender, lt.thread_type, COUNT(*) n FROM lt JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=lt.customer_id JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=lt.customer_id WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead' GROUP BY lt.sender,lt.thread_type
"""),
('open_active_issues', "SELECT i.group_id, COUNT(*) open, AVG(i.days_open) avg_age FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=i.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed' WHERE i.status='open' GROUP BY i.group_id ORDER BY open DESC"),
]:
    print('\n--',name)
    r=nm.query(q)
    rows=r['rows']
    print('rows',len(rows))
    for row in rows[:80]: print(row)
